calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-19-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger
Petitioner, Barbara Anne Kalil, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Robert Vincent Faletti and change of gender from female to male.
Decree signed in open court.
